subcodes.first_line: O thou who art made happy be the Fragrances of God! Verily, I have not forgotten thee and will never forget thee. I supplicate my Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المهتزه بنفحات الله انی مانسیتک و لاانساک و اتضرع الی مولای و مولاک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
